'''鈭歴h-r-m-b''' ('''kasharmeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vouchsafe|vouchsafe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vouchsafe|vouchsafe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-r-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| kasharmeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharmeboko|thisharmeboko]] || [[word:jisharmeboko|jisharmeboko]] || [[word:shisharmeboko|shisharmeboko]] || [[word:kisharmeboko|kisharmeboko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
